name: LG_UPDATESRVFORTRANS_323_01
definition:
CREATE PROCEDURE LG_UPDATESRVFORTRANS_323_01
       @SRVREF         INT,
       @TRDATE         DATETIME,
       @TRCODE         SMALLINT,
       @CANCELLED      SMALLINT,
       @SOURCEINDEX    SMALLINT,
       @VATINC         SMALLINT,
       @ORDTRANSREF    INT,
       @UINFO1         FLOAT,
       @UINFO2         FLOAT,
       @VAT            FLOAT,
       @DISTCOST       FLOAT,
       @DISTADDEXP     FLOAT,
       @PRICE          FLOAT,
       @REPORTRATE     FLOAT,
       @AMOUNT         FLOAT,
       @COEF           SMALLINT,
       @STATUS         SMALLINT,
       @MONTH          SMALLINT,
       @YEAR           SMALLINT,
       @OFFTRREF       INT,
       @OFFERREF       INT,
       @BILLEDFLAG     SMALLINT AS
DECLARE @EPSILON      FLOAT
DECLARE @TRMON        SMALLINT
DECLARE @CALCSIGN     SMALLINT
DECLARE @DCOST        FLOAT
DECLARE @CAMOUNT      FLOAT
DECLARE @CPRICE       FLOAT
DECLARE @ORDCFACT     FLOAT
DECLARE @AMOUNTINC    FLOAT
DECLARE @ADJAMNT      FLOAT
DECLARE @ORDFICHEREF  INT
DECLARE @CFACT        FLOAT
DECLARE @ORDUINF1     FLOAT
DECLARE @ORDUINF2     FLOAT
DECLARE @par_Year     SMALLINT
DECLARE @updOrdersFlag SMALLINT
DECLARE @pRetEffect SMALLINT
DECLARE @sRetEffect SMALLINT
DECLARE @ft_PerSatIade SMALLINT
DECLARE @ft_TopSatIade SMALLINT
DECLARE @ft_KonsCikIade SMALLINT
DECLARE @ft_AlimIade SMALLINT
DECLARE @ft_KonsGirIade SMALLINT
SELECT @EPSILON = 0.0000001
SELECT @AMOUNTINC = 0.0
SELECT
  @ft_PerSatIade = 2
 ,@ft_TopSatIade = 3
 ,@ft_KonsCikIade = 4
 ,@ft_AlimIade = 6
 ,@ft_KonsGirIade = 10
SELECT @TRMON = ISNULL(@MONTH, 0), @par_Year = ISNULL(@YEAR, 0)
IF ((@TRMON = 0) OR (@par_Year = 0 ) )
EXECUTE LG_FINDRELATIVEMONTH_323_01 @TRDATE, @TRMON OUTPUT, @par_Year OUTPUT
SELECT @CAMOUNT = 0.0
IF (@TRMON <> 0) AND (@AMOUNT <> 0) AND (@TRCODE <> 5) AND (@TRCODE <> 10) AND (@CANCELLED = 0) AND ((@STATUS = 0) OR (@STATUS IS NULL))
 BEGIN
       SELECT @CALCSIGN = 1
       SELECT @CPRICE = @PRICE
       IF ((@TRCODE = 2) OR (@TRCODE = 3) OR (@TRCODE = 6))
        SELECT @CALCSIGN = -1
       SELECT @DCOST = @DISTCOST + @DISTADDEXP
       IF (@TRCODE = 2) OR (@TRCODE = 7) OR
          (((@TRCODE = 1) OR (@TRCODE = 4) OR (@TRCODE = 5) OR (@TRCODE = 6) OR
          (@TRCODE = 10) OR ((@TRCODE >= 30) AND (@TRCODE <= 34))) AND (@VATINC = 1))
        SELECT @CPRICE = (@PRICE*100.0)/(@VAT+100.0)
       EXECUTE LG_CONVFACT @UINFO1, @UINFO2, @CFACT OUTPUT
       SELECT @CAMOUNT = @CALCSIGN * @AMOUNT * @CFACT
       SELECT @AMOUNTINC = @CAMOUNT * @COEF
 END
IF (@ORDTRANSREF <> 0) AND (@TRMON <> 0)
 BEGIN SELECT @pRetEffect = PRETURNEFFECTORDER, @sRetEffect = SRETURNEFFECTORDER FROM LG_323_TRGPAR
       IF (
            ((@pRetEffect = 0) AND ((@trCode IN (@ft_AlimIade)) OR (@trCode = @ft_KonsGirIade AND @BILLEDFLAG = 0))) OR
         ((@sRetEffect = 0) AND ((@trCode IN (@ft_PerSatIade, @ft_TopSatIade)) OR (@trCode = @ft_KonsCikIade AND @BILLEDFLAG = 0)))
          )
        SELECT @updOrdersFlag = 0
      ELSE
      SELECT @updOrdersFlag = 1
 END
IF (@ORDTRANSREF <> 0) AND (@TRMON <> 0) AND (@updOrdersFlag <> 0)
 BEGIN IF EXISTS(SELECT LOGICALREF FROM LG_323_01_ORFLINE
           WHERE (LOGICALREF = @ORDTRANSREF))
        SELECT @ORDFICHEREF = ORDFICHEREF,
               @ORDUINF1 = UINFO1,
               @ORDUINF2 = UINFO2 FROM LG_323_01_ORFLINE
         WHERE LOGICALREF = @ORDTRANSREF
        ELSE BEGIN SELECT @ORDUINF1 = 0
                   SELECT @ORDUINF2 = 0
                   SELECT @ORDFICHEREF = 0
             END
       EXECUTE LG_CONVFACT @ORDUINF1, @ORDUINF2, @ORDCFACT OUTPUT
       IF (@ORDCFACT > @EPSILON)
        SELECT @ADJAMNT = @COEF * @CAMOUNT / @ORDCFACT
        ELSE SELECT @ADJAMNT = @COEF * @CAMOUNT
       UPDATE LG_323_01_ORFLINE
        SET TRGFLAG = 1,
            SHIPPEDAMOUNT = SHIPPEDAMOUNT + @ADJAMNT
        WHERE (LOGICALREF = @ORDTRANSREF)
 END
IF (@OFFTRREF <> 0)
 BEGIN UPDATE LG_323_PURCHOFFERLN
       SET ORDEREDAMOUNT = ORDEREDAMOUNT + @AMOUNTINC
       WHERE (LOGICALREF = @OFFTRREF)
 END
